'''Chidee Na Maak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]], starshipwright, and proprietor of the [[StarForge Shipyard]] that he inherited after his parents had been killed in an accidental fuel explosion.<ref name="PP" /> He was a friend of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] and was always trying to acquire [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] as an employee. According to Solo, Maak was the best at fixing [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210 light freighters]].

==Biography==
Chidee Na Maak started his career by working as an engineer on various [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. He returned to StarForge after his parents [[Death/Legends|died]] and took over operating the shipyard. He managed to resist efforts to take over his business and proceeded to make the shipyard the most important business on [[StarForge Station]]. He was in a relationship with [[Kuuda De Nall]].<ref name="PP" />

==Personality and traits==
Chidee Na Maak was gregarious and outgoing. He made friends easily, and had contacts across the [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]].<ref name="PP" />
